arts.ttl: Non-League Day could offer fans the chance to see future England stars play
arts.sum: Non-league day takes place this weekend with the absence of Premier Leagu and Championship football providing ample opportunity for football fans to see teams further down the pyramid

arts.ttl: Schick hot on Kane's trail in hunt to be Bundesliga top-scorer
arts.sum: The 29-year-old marksman is hopeful he can finish the campaign as the Bundesrepublik's top-scorer, all while challenging Bayern for the Meisterschale.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Thomas Tuchel makes huge Marcus Rashford call as first England XI announced
arts.sum: ENGLAND VS ALBANIA: The Three Lions kick-off their World Cup qualifying campaign under Thomas Tuchel at Wembley on Friday evening and the German has made a few interesting decisions with his starting XI

arts.ttl: England’s Transfer XI: Tuchel’s best team based on summer signings
arts.sum: Spurs signed Archie Gray from Leeds for a massive €41.25 million in the summer despite him being just 18 years of age. Lewis Hall was a promising player on loan at Newcastle last season, but he didn't look particularly great.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri: Arsenal phenom receives World Cup approval despite Thomas Tuchel England snub
arts.sum: England boss Thomas Tuchel was right to snub Ethan Nwaneri, but the Arsenal starlet is a safe bet for the 2026 World Cup, expert Charles Watts claims.

arts.ttl: How to watch England v Albania on TV tonight for free - kick-off time and channel details
arts.sum: England host Albania in Thomas Tuchel's first game in charge of the Three Lions at Wembley tonight

arts.ttl: The youngest England debutants in history
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly is set to make his England debut this evening with the Arsenal teenager expected to be named in the side to face Albania. It marks a meteoric rise for the 18-year-old, who has enjoyed a breakout campaign in North London. arts.ttl: England & Wales begin World Cup qualifying - all you need to know
arts.sum: European qualification for the 2026 World Cup begins this week, with England and Wales among the nations in action. BBC Sport looks at all you need to know.

arts.ttl: England captain Kane feels he is 'taken for granted'
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane says he is "taken for granted" and feels people have become "bored" of his goalscoring record.
